channel.title: The Comeuppance Report
channel.description: Fictional messenger-style chat dramas where bad choices meet records, witnesses, and consequences.

item.title: Power-Tripping Female Boss Fired The Quiet Night-Shift Worker In The Group Chat. Then The Security Log Answered.
item.description: A fictional workplace chat drama about a group-chat firing and the security log that exposed the truth.

item.title: Entitled Customer Ate Every Bite, Demanded A Refund, And Forgot The Register Kept Receipts.
item.description: A fictional cafe chat drama about a refund demand and a receipt timeline.

item.title: Bitter HOA Neighbor Blocked A Single Dad's Driveway. The Building Manager Opened The Parking Records.
item.description: A fictional neighbor dispute chat drama about parking records and accountability.

item.title: Controlling Bride Demanded A Free Cake Redesign. The Baker Opened The Email Thread At The Family Meeting.
item.description: A fictional wedding chat drama about approved changes and email receipts.

item.title: Smug Group Leader Took Credit For The Whole Project. The File History Showed Who Built Every Slide.
item.description: A fictional school chat drama about contribution records and file history.
